TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Tamim bin Hamad Al Thani ryax sa tay 3 nqu tay 6, Tamim bin Hamad Al Thani, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1980) mrhuw Qatar ta' misuw hya' ga Tamim bin Hamad Al Thani, aring ryax tay 25 squ byacing tay 6 sa kawas 2013 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: tamim ő≤in ńßama* al tńßani rjax s~…ēa taj * nqu taj *, tamim ő≤in ńßama* al tńßani, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw qatar ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a tamim ő≤in ńßama* al tńßani, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
S.FORM: Tamim bin Hamad Al Thani ryax sa tay 3 nqu tay 6, Tamim bin Hamad Al Thani, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1980) mrhuw Qatar ta' misuw hya' ga Tamim bin Hamad Al Thani, aring ryax tay 25 squ byacing tay 6 sa kawas 2013 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
